Welcome to
Try Fusa OS

Experience the Difference

Fusa OS is designed to breathe new life into older hardware. Experience a fluid, modern interface and powerful features that make your devices feel new again. It's the perfect solution for sustainability, affordability, and a delightful user experience.

Key Features

Lightning Fast

Designed for performance, Fusa OS runs smoothly even on resource-limited devices, offering unparalleled responsiveness.

Elegant Design

A clean, intuitive, and visually appealing interface that enhances usability and enjoyment.

️

Customizable

Tailor your Fusa OS experience with a wide range of personalization options to suit your workflow.

Sustainable Choice

Reduce e-waste and give older devices a purposeful second life, contributing to a greener planet.

In-depth Documentation

Welcome to Fusa OS: Your Digital Home

Beautiful. Simple. Yours.

Fusa OS is a modern web-based operating system environment designed to feel natural, expressive, and deeply personal. Built entirely inside the browser, it transforms everyday web experiences into a smooth desktop-like ecosystem focused on creativity, productivity, entertainment, and exploration.

A More Human Way to Use the Web

Fusa OS introduces the Glass-Clay design language — an interface style that feels as clear as glass and as soft as clay. Every interaction is designed with fluid movement, depth, bounce, and responsiveness to make digital tasks feel alive and enjoyable.

Whether opening apps, moving windows, or navigating the interface, every animation and transition is carefully crafted to create a more emotional and immersive computing experience.

Daily Essentials

Files: A clean and minimal file browser for viewing and organizing digital content.

Settings: Customize themes, colors, interface behaviors, and visual styles.

Notes: A lightweight space for reminders, brainstorming, and quick writing.

Calculator: A visually immersive 3D-style calculator for basic and advanced equations.

Mail: A distraction-free email experience designed around simplicity.

Clock: A minimalist clock application integrated naturally into the desktop.

Knowledge & Exploration

FusaWeb: A fast native web browser built specifically for the Fusa OS ecosystem.

Wikipedia: Instantly search and explore information in a clean readable layout.

Maps: Navigate locations and discover destinations directly from the desktop.

Archive: Access millions of public-domain books, movies, and digital artifacts.

Weather: A visually rich “Liquid Glass” weather experience.

Stocks: Monitor financial markets and favorite companies with ease.

Entertainment & Social

YouTube: Watch creators and videos inside a premium theater-style environment.

Music: An immersive music player designed for album exploration.

TV: A fullscreen entertainment hub for movies and streaming experiences.

Radio: Explore live radio stations from countries around the world.

Messages: A simple messaging experience focused on connection.

Photos: A bright gallery designed to make images stand out beautifully.

Creativity & Intelligence

F-AI (Assistant): An integrated AI assistant for writing, brainstorming, and conversation.

Draw: A digital canvas for sketching and creative experimentation.

Edit / Camera: Capture photos and enhance them with professional filters.

Journal: A private writing space for reflection and long-form thoughts.

Quotes: A curated collection of motivational and thoughtful quotes.

Play & Advanced Tools

TETR.IO: A fast-paced modern block-stacking game.

2048: The classic puzzle game reimagined inside Fusa OS.

App Store: Discover and install new apps and experiences.

Terminal: An advanced utility for exploring deeper system functionality.

Orb: The startup engine responsible for powering the Fusa OS experience.

Technical Information

Fusa OS is built entirely using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, allowing it to run directly within modern web browsers while remaining lightweight, fluid, and highly customizable.

  • Published: Dec 30, 2024
  • Status: Released
  • Platform: HTML5
  • Author: Luca Musa

Welcome to Fusa Pocket: Your World, Anywhere.

Beautiful. Simple. Yours.

Fusa Pocket is the mobile companion to the desktop experience you love. Designed specifically for phones and smaller screens, it transforms your device into a smooth, immersive, and highly personalized mobile operating environment.

A Mobile Experience Designed Around You

Fusa Pocket uses the Glass-Clay design language — a soft, fluid visual style that combines transparent layers, smooth depth, and responsive animations to make every tap and swipe feel natural.

Every interaction is optimized for mobile comfort, speed, and fluidity, helping daily tasks feel effortless and visually immersive while on the move.

Daily Essentials

Files: Browse and organize your documents easily from anywhere.

Settings: Customize themes, colors, and your overall mobile experience.

Notes: Quickly write ideas, reminders, and lists on the go.

Calculator: A friendly and intuitive tool for quick calculations.

Mail: Access your inbox in a clean distraction-free environment.

Clock: A sleek time experience optimized for mobile displays.

Knowledge & Exploration

FusaWeb: A mobile-first browser focused on speed and smooth navigation.

Wikipedia: Instantly access information in a clean mobile layout.

Maps: Navigate the world and discover destinations with ease.

Archive: Carry millions of books and movies in your pocket.

Weather: A beautiful Liquid Glass weather interface with immersive visuals.

Stocks: Track favorite companies and financial markets anywhere.

Entertainment & Social

YouTube: Enjoy creators and videos in a premium theater-style experience.

Music: A vivid mobile music player built around immersive listening.

TV: A fullscreen movie and streaming experience optimized for phones.

Radio: Listen to live radio stations from across the globe.

Messages: Stay connected through a simple and friendly messaging interface.

Photos: A bright mobile gallery that enhances your memories beautifully.

Creativity & Intelligence

F-AI (Assistant): Your mobile AI companion for writing, learning, and planning.

Draw: A mobile digital canvas for sketching and brainstorming.

Edit / Camera: Capture photos and enhance them using easy professional filters.

Journal: A private writing space for thoughts, memories, and travel logs.

Quotes: Daily inspiration and motivational wisdom.

Play & Advanced Tools

TETR.IO: Fast-paced gaming perfect for quick moments of downtime.

2048: A relaxing and addictive puzzle game for mobile play.

App Store: Quickly discover and install apps for your mobile home screen.

Terminal: A powerful utility for users curious about the system.

Orb: The intelligent engine powering the Fusa Pocket experience.

Technical Information

Fusa Pocket is built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with responsive layouts and mobile-first interactions designed specifically for touch devices and modern browsers.

Fusa Pocket

Beautiful. Simple. Yours.

Device Support

Get the latest news and updates from Fusa OS.

About Fusa OS Features Documentation Community Support

FUSA OS is a personal project and is not a company. It is an open-source, community-driven initiative created for educational purposes and to foster learning and collaboration. This project is provided as-is, without any warranties or guarantees of any kind.

This project is conceptual and not a commercial product. FUSA OS is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or licensed by any other company. Trademarks and logos are used for informational purposes only.

By using FUSA OS, you agree to release the creators and contributors from any liability related to your use of the project.
